segments.text: Then Eliphaz the Temanite responded and said,
How can anyone be of help to God? Even wise people are only helpful to themselves.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Is it any benefit to the Almighty if you're a good person? What does he gain if you do what's right?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Does he correct you and bring charges against you because of your reverence?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: No: it's because you're so wicked! Your sins are never-ending!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: For no reason at all you took your brother's clothing as a security for a debt, and left them stripped naked.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: You refused water to the thirsty; you denied food to the hungry.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Is it because the land belongs to the powerful, and only the privileged have a right to live there?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: You have sent widows away empty-handed; you have crushed the outstretched arms of orphans, begging for help.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: That's why you're surrounded by traps to catch you, and why you suddenly panic in terror.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: That's why it's so dark you cannot see, and why you feel like you're drowning.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Doesn't God live high in heaven and looks down on even the highest stars?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: But you ask, ‘What does God know? How can he see and judge what happens down here in darkness?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Thick clouds cover him so he can't see anything as he walks around in heaven.’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Why do you insist on following the traditional thinking of the wicked?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They were taken before their time; all they had built was washed away.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They had told God, ‘Get lost! What can the Almighty do to us?’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: And yet he was the one who had filled their homes with good things—but I don't accept their way of thinking.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Those who do right rejoice when they see the destruction of the wicked,  and the innocent mock them,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: saying, ‘Our enemies are destroyed, and fire has burned up all that's left of them.’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Come back to God and be reconciled to him, and you'll be prosperous again.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Listen to what he tells you and keep his words in mind.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: If you return to God you will be restored. If you renounce your sinful life
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: and give up your love of money and desire for possessions,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: then the Almighty will be your gold and your precious silver.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Then you will find delight in the Almighty, and be able to face him without feeling ashamed.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: You will pray to him, and he will hear you, and you will keep your promises to him.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Whatever you decide to do will be successful, and wherever you go, light will shine on you.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: When others are humbled, and you say, ‘please help them,’ God will save them.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: God saves those who are innocent, and you will be saved if you do what is right.
segments.speaker: Unknown
